question: What two protest slogans are demonstrated during the red-shirted Unite Here workers' street demonstration, and which three contractual demands form the basis of their strike?
answer: Protesters chant slogans including "Respect Our Work" and "Make Them Pay". Their three core contractual demands are higher wages, better staffing levels, and fairer workloads.

video: A group of protesters wearing red shirts and holding signs march down a street, chanting slogans such as "Respect Our Work" and "Make Them Pay".
text: Striking workers demand higher wages, better staffing levels, and fairer workloads.
